name: Business Email Compromise Response
description: Comprehensive playbook for responding to Business Email Compromise (BEC) attacks including CEO fraud, wire transfer fraud, vendor impersonation, and account takeover targeting financial transactions and sensitive business operations.

phases.name: Identification
phases.description: The purpose of the Identification stage is to accurately determine the BEC attack type, scope, and perform immediate containment to prevent financial loss.

tasks.title: Initiate CIRT Team Meeting and Execute Escalation Procedures
tasks.content: Business Email Compromise incidents require immediate escalation due to potential for significant financial loss. Engage finance, legal, and executive leadership immediately.
outcomes: First Core CIRT meeting is held with Finance and Legal
Privileged Communications is established with legal counsel

subtasks.title: Initiate emergency CIRT meeting
subtasks.content: Initiated emergency meeting of the organizational core CIRT with Finance and Legal present.

subtasks.title: Notify executive leadership
subtasks.content: Immediately notified CFO, CEO, and relevant executives about potential BEC incident.

subtasks.title: Notify CIRT team members
subtasks.content: Notified CIRT team members using emergency contact procedures.

subtasks.title: Verify Incident Severity
subtasks.content: Verified the Incident Severity - BEC incidents are typically high or critical due to financial impact.

subtasks.title: Involve Finance team
subtasks.content: Immediately involved Finance team to review pending/recent wire transfers and payment requests.

subtasks.title: Work with Legal Counsel
subtasks.content: Worked closely with Legal Counsel regarding potential fraud, law enforcement notification, and regulatory requirements.

tasks.title: Validate Business Email Compromise Incident
tasks.content: Confirm the incident is a BEC attack and identify the specific type: CEO fraud, vendor impersonation, account compromise, attorney impersonation, or W-2 phishing.

subtasks.title: Analyze suspicious email
subtasks.content: Analyzed the suspicious email including headers, sender address, reply-to address, and content for signs of spoofing or compromise.

subtasks.title: Identify BEC type
subtasks.content: Identified BEC type: CEO Fraud (executive impersonation), Vendor Email Compromise, Account Compromise, Attorney Impersonation, or HR/W-2 Phishing.

subtasks.title: Check for account compromise
subtasks.content: Checked if legitimate email account was compromised vs. external spoofing by reviewing login logs and sent items.

subtasks.title: Verify with claimed sender
subtasks.content: Verified with the claimed sender (executive, vendor, etc.) through out-of-band communication that they did NOT send the email.

subtasks.title: Review payment requests
subtasks.content: Reviewed any payment or wire transfer requests for legitimacy and whether they were processed.

tasks.title: Determine Financial Impact and Stop Payments
tasks.content: Immediately assess financial impact and take urgent action to stop any fraudulent payments or wire transfers.
outcomes: All fraudulent payment requests are identified
Completed payments are identified for recovery

subtasks.title: Review recent payment requests
subtasks.content: Reviewed all payment requests from the past 30 days that match the BEC pattern (wire transfers, ACH, check requests).

subtasks.title: Stop pending payments
subtasks.content: Immediately stopped any pending payments or wire transfers related to the BEC attack.

subtasks.title: Contact financial institutions
subtasks.content: Contacted banks and financial institutions to stop/recall any recently completed fraudulent transfers.

subtasks.title: Document financial impact
subtasks.content: Documented total financial impact including attempted and completed fraudulent transfers.

subtasks.title: Freeze additional transfers
subtasks.content: Implemented temporary freeze or enhanced verification for all outgoing wire transfers and large payments.

tasks.title: Determine Scope of Compromise
tasks.content: Identify all affected email accounts, systems, and understand how the attacker gained access or impersonated legitimate parties.
outcomes: All compromised email accounts are identified

subtasks.title: Review email logs
subtasks.content: Reviewed email server logs and mail flow logs to identify suspicious emails and recipients.

subtasks.title: Check for account compromise
subtasks.content: Checked authentication logs for compromised executive or vendor email accounts showing unauthorized access.

subtasks.title: Identify all recipients
subtasks.content: Identified all employees who received similar BEC emails to determine full scope.

subtasks.title: Search for similar emails
subtasks.content: Searched mailboxes for similar fraudulent emails using patterns, sender domains, and subject lines.

subtasks.title: Interview affected employees
subtasks.content: Interviewed employees who received or responded to BEC emails to understand actions taken.

tasks.title: Contact Law Enforcement and Report Fraud
tasks.content: BEC incidents should be reported to law enforcement immediately, particularly FBI IC3, to enable recovery efforts and investigation.
outcomes: Financial institution fraud departments are engaged

subtasks.title: File FBI IC3 complaint
subtasks.content: Filed complaint with FBI Internet Crime Complaint Center (IC3) at ic3.gov including all relevant details and transaction information.

subtasks.title: Contact local FBI field office
subtasks.content: Contacted local FBI field office directly for BEC incidents involving large dollar amounts.

subtasks.title: Notify financial institution fraud dept
subtasks.content: Notified bank's fraud department and requested Financial Fraud Kill Chain to potentially recover funds.

subtasks.title: Document case numbers
subtasks.content: Documented all case numbers, contact information, and law enforcement liaison details.

tasks.title: Assess Need for External Support
tasks.content: Determine if external forensics, legal, or fraud recovery experts are needed.
outcomes: Decision is made whether to hire fraud recovery firm
Decision is made whether to hire forensics experts
Decision is made whether to hire external legal counsel

subtasks.title: Consider fraud recovery service
subtasks.content: Considered retaining a fraud recovery service to assist with recovering transferred funds.

subtasks.title: Consider forensics investigation
subtasks.content: Considered retaining digital forensics experts to investigate email compromise or account takeover.

subtasks.title: Consider outside legal counsel
subtasks.content: Considered retaining outside legal counsel specializing in cybercrime and fraud.

tasks.title: Send Internal Communications
tasks.content: Alert employees about the BEC attack to prevent additional victims and reinforce verification procedures.
outcomes: Employees know how to report suspicious requests

subtasks.title: Send immediate security alert
subtasks.content: Sent immediate security alert to all employees warning about active BEC attack targeting the organization.

subtasks.title: Reinforce verification procedures
subtasks.content: Reinforced payment verification procedures requiring out-of-band confirmation for all wire transfers and payment changes.

subtasks.title: Provide reporting instructions
subtasks.content: Provided clear instructions on how to report suspicious payment requests or executive emails.

subtasks.title: Alert Finance and AP teams
subtasks.content: Sent specific alert to Finance, Accounts Payable, and Procurement teams with enhanced vigilance instructions.

phases.name: Containment
phases.description: The main objective of the Containment stage is to stop the BEC attack, prevent additional financial loss, and secure compromised accounts.

tasks.title: Secure Compromised Email Accounts
tasks.content: If email accounts were compromised, immediately secure them and revoke access.

subtasks.title: Reset account passwords
subtasks.content: Reset passwords for all compromised email accounts immediately.

subtasks.title: Revoke active sessions
subtasks.content: Revoked all active sessions and forced re-authentication for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Enable MFA
subtasks.content: Enabled or re-registered multi-factor authentication for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Review mailbox rules
subtasks.content: Reviewed and removed any suspicious mailbox forwarding rules, auto-forward settings, or filters created by attacker.

subtasks.title: Check delegated access
subtasks.content: Checked for and removed any unauthorized delegated mailbox access or application permissions.

tasks.title: Block Malicious Emails and Domains
tasks.content: Block the sender addresses and domains used in the BEC attack to prevent further emails from reaching employees.

subtasks.title: Block sender addresses
subtasks.content: Blocked all sender email addresses used in the BEC attack at the email gateway.

subtasks.title: Block spoofed domains
subtasks.content: Blocked lookalike or typosquatting domains used to impersonate legitimate domains.

subtasks.title: Create email filter rules
subtasks.content: Created email filter rules to quarantine similar BEC emails based on subject lines, content patterns, and sender characteristics.

subtasks.title: Remove BEC emails from mailboxes
subtasks.content: Removed/quarantined BEC emails from all user mailboxes to prevent further interaction.

tasks.title: Implement Enhanced Payment Verification
tasks.content: Immediately implement enhanced verification procedures for all payment requests and financial transactions.
outcomes: Temporary payment holds are in place

subtasks.title: Require dual authorization
subtasks.content: Implemented requirement for dual authorization on all wire transfers and payments over threshold amount.

subtasks.title: Mandate callback verification
subtasks.content: Mandated callback verification using known phone numbers (not from email) for all payment change requests and large transfers.

subtasks.title: Flag vendor account changes
subtasks.content: Flagged all vendor banking information changes for extra scrutiny and verification.

subtasks.title: Implement temporary holds
subtasks.content: Implemented temporary holds or delays on all wire transfers to allow for verification.

tasks.title: Coordinate with Financial Institutions
tasks.content: Work with banks and financial institutions to attempt recovery of transferred funds through the Financial Fraud Kill Chain.
outcomes: Banks are engaged for fund recovery
Financial Fraud Kill Chain is activated

subtasks.title: Contact originating bank
subtasks.content: Contacted organization's bank immediately to report fraud and request recall of wire transfers.

subtasks.title: Request Financial Fraud Kill Chain
subtasks.content: Requested activation of FBI's Financial Fraud Kill Chain process to freeze funds at receiving bank.

subtasks.title: Provide transaction details
subtasks.content: Provided complete transaction details including amounts, dates, receiving account information, and wire instructions.

subtasks.title: Contact receiving bank
subtasks.content: Worked with law enforcement to contact receiving bank to freeze fraudulent account.

subtasks.title: File insurance claim
subtasks.content: Filed claim with cyber insurance or crime insurance policy if applicable.

tasks.title: Issue Communications Updates
tasks.content: Provide updates to stakeholders on containment actions and prevention measures.

subtasks.title: Update executive leadership
subtasks.content: Updated executive leadership on containment actions, financial impact, and recovery efforts.

subtasks.title: Communicate new procedures
subtasks.content: Communicated new payment verification procedures to all relevant staff.

subtasks.title: Remind about reporting
subtasks.content: Reminded employees to report any suspicious payment requests or executive communications.

phases.name: Eradication
phases.description: The Eradication stage focuses on removing attacker access, addressing security gaps, and preventing future BEC attacks.

tasks.title: Remove Attacker Persistence Mechanisms
tasks.content: Ensure attackers have no remaining access through compromised credentials, forwarding rules, or other persistence.

subtasks.title: Remove forwarding rules
subtasks.content: Removed all suspicious email forwarding rules, transport rules, and mail flow modifications.

subtasks.title: Revoke OAuth tokens
subtasks.content: Revoked all OAuth tokens and application permissions for compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Reset related credentials
subtasks.content: Reset passwords for any accounts that shared credentials with compromised accounts.

subtasks.title: Check for backdoor accounts
subtasks.content: Checked for creation of backdoor accounts or guest accounts by the attacker.

tasks.title: Implement Email Authentication Controls
tasks.content: Deploy email authentication technologies to prevent spoofing and impersonation.

subtasks.title: Configure DMARC policy
subtasks.content: Configured DMARC policy to reject or quarantine emails failing authentication checks.

subtasks.title: Harden SPF records
subtasks.content: Hardened SPF records to explicitly authorize sending servers and reject others.

subtasks.title: Enable DKIM signing
subtasks.content: Enabled DKIM signing for all outbound emails from the organization.

subtasks.title: Deploy external email banners
subtasks.content: Deployed external email warning banners to alert recipients when emails come from outside the organization.

subtasks.title: Block lookalike domains
subtasks.content: Configured email gateway to block emails from lookalike or typosquatting domains.

tasks.title: Strengthen Financial Controls
tasks.content: Implement improved financial controls and verification procedures to prevent future BEC success.

subtasks.title: Formalize verification procedures
subtasks.content: Formalized and documented payment verification procedures including callback requirements.

subtasks.title: Implement dollar thresholds
subtasks.content: Implemented dollar thresholds requiring escalating levels of approval for payments and wire transfers.

subtasks.title: Create vendor verification process
subtasks.content: Created formal process for verifying vendor banking information changes through multiple channels.

subtasks.title: Establish payment delay policy
subtasks.content: Established policy for mandatory delay period between request and execution of large wire transfers.

tasks.title: Update Security Policies
tasks.content: Update security policies to address BEC threats and establish clear procedures.

subtasks.title: Create BEC response procedures
subtasks.content: Created formal BEC incident response procedures for future incidents.

subtasks.title: Update AUP
subtasks.content: Updated Acceptable Use Policy to include email security requirements and verification responsibilities.

subtasks.title: Document escalation procedures
subtasks.content: Documented clear escalation procedures for suspicious payment requests.

phases.name: Recovery
phases.description: The Recovery stage aims to restore normal operations, recover funds if possible, and strengthen defenses.

tasks.title: Restore Compromised Accounts
tasks.content: Fully restore any compromised email accounts to normal operation with enhanced security.

subtasks.title: Verify account security
subtasks.content: Verified that all security settings are properly configured including MFA, backup codes, and recovery options.

subtasks.title: Restore mailbox functionality
subtasks.content: Restored full mailbox functionality and verified legitimate rules and delegates are in place.

subtasks.title: Monitor for suspicious activity
subtasks.content: Implemented enhanced monitoring for compromised accounts to detect any residual attacker activity.

tasks.title: Pursue Fund Recovery
tasks.content: Continue efforts to recover transferred funds through legal and law enforcement channels.
outcomes: Legal action is initiated if appropriate

subtasks.title: Work with law enforcement
subtasks.content: Continued working with FBI and local law enforcement on fund recovery and investigation.

subtasks.title: Pursue civil legal action
subtasks.content: Evaluated and pursued civil legal action against receiving parties if identifiable.

subtasks.title: Process insurance claims
subtasks.content: Processed cyber insurance or crime insurance claims for financial losses.

subtasks.title: Document recovery efforts
subtasks.content: Documented all fund recovery efforts and outcomes for financial and legal records.

tasks.title: Resume Normal Payment Operations
tasks.content: Carefully resume normal payment operations with enhanced security measures in place.
outcomes: Payment operations resume with new controls
Staff are trained on new procedures

subtasks.title: Lift payment holds
subtasks.content: Lifted temporary payment holds and freezes with new verification procedures in place.

subtasks.title: Train finance staff
subtasks.content: Trained finance and AP staff on new payment verification procedures and BEC awareness.

subtasks.title: Communicate to vendors
subtasks.content: Communicated to vendors about new payment verification procedures and potential delays.

tasks.title: Issue Final Communications
tasks.content: Communicate incident resolution and lessons learned to stakeholders.

subtasks.title: Update executive leadership
subtasks.content: Provided final update to executive leadership on incident resolution, financial impact, and prevention measures.

subtasks.title: Communicate to organization
subtasks.content: Communicated to entire organization about incident resolution and reinforced BEC awareness.

tasks.title: Resolve Incident
tasks.content: Formally close the BEC incident once all recovery actions are complete.

subtasks.title: Verify all actions complete
subtasks.content: Verified that all technical remediation, fund recovery efforts, and policy updates are complete.

subtasks.title: Change incident status
subtasks.content: Changed status of incident to 'resolved'.

phases.name: Lessons Learned
phases.description: The Lessons Learned stage compiles incident information and implements improvements to prevent future BEC attacks.

tasks.title: Generate Incident Report
tasks.content: Create comprehensive incident report documenting the BEC attack, response, and financial impact.

subtasks.title: Generate report
subtasks.content: Generated the incident report using the Reports tab.

subtasks.title: Document financial impact
subtasks.content: Documented complete financial impact including attempted, successful, and recovered amounts.

subtasks.title: Document response effectiveness
subtasks.content: Documented effectiveness of response actions and fund recovery efforts.

subtasks.title: Share with leadership
subtasks.content: Shared report with executive leadership, finance, and board if required.

tasks.title: Conduct Lessons Learned Session
tasks.content: Hold session with all stakeholders to identify improvements to BEC prevention and response.

subtasks.title: Prepare presentation
subtasks.content: Prepared presentation covering attack timeline, financial impact, response actions, and recommendations.

subtasks.title: Host session
subtasks.content: Hosted lessons learned session with Security, Finance, Legal, and Executive teams.

subtasks.title: Identify control gaps
subtasks.content: Identified specific gaps in email security, financial controls, and employee awareness that enabled the attack.

subtasks.title: Create action plan
subtasks.content: Created prioritized action plan for implementing improvements.

tasks.title: Implement BEC Awareness Training
tasks.content: Deploy comprehensive BEC awareness training for all employees, with specialized training for finance staff.

subtasks.title: Deploy BEC awareness training
subtasks.content: Deployed organization-wide training on BEC attacks, red flags, and reporting procedures.

subtasks.title: Conduct finance team training
subtasks.content: Conducted specialized training for finance, accounting, and procurement teams on BEC threats and verification procedures.

subtasks.title: Conduct executive awareness
subtasks.content: Conducted executive awareness session on CEO fraud and impersonation tactics.

subtasks.title: Plan simulated BEC exercises
subtasks.content: Planned simulated BEC exercises to test employee awareness and verification procedures.

tasks.title: Review and Update Financial Controls
tasks.content: Continuously review and improve financial controls based on emerging BEC tactics.

subtasks.title: Test verification procedures
subtasks.content: Tested payment verification procedures to ensure they are followed consistently.

subtasks.title: Monitor for BEC trends
subtasks.content: Subscribed to threat intelligence on emerging BEC tactics and trends.

subtasks.title: Schedule periodic reviews
subtasks.content: Scheduled periodic reviews of financial controls and BEC defenses.
